attr.title: Antecrypt
attr.desc: Shoot corrupting monsters and save mankind's last hard-drive with your rechargeable laser-beam! ... But your aiming has a mind of its own, so you'll have to make do!
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam or Itch.io. For Itch.io, download the MacOS version and copy the antecrypt.app into gamedata. For Steam, download the MacOS version using the following Steam console command: download_depot 1659920 1659922 959787945917647264, and then copy the files into gamedata.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1659920/Antecrypt) or [itch.io](https://punkcake.itch.io/antecrypt). For Itch.io, download the MacOS version and copy the antecrypt.app into `gamedata`. For Steam, download the MacOS version using the following [Steam console](steam://open/console) command: `download_depot 1659920 1659922 959787945917647264`, and then copy the files into `gamedata`.
